name: Heavenly Dessert Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Nufchatel Cheese (LIGHT, equivalent to Philadelphia Neufchâtel Cheese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure the Nufchatel Cheese is softened and light in color.
2. Lightly grease a 9-inch springform pan with butter or oil.
3. Sprinkle the graham cracker crumbs evenly over the bottom of the greased pan.
4. Dust off any excess crumbs.
5. In a blender container, process the cottage cheese until smooth.
6. In a large mixing bowl of an electric mixer, combine the smooth cottage cheese, softened Nufchatel Cheese, sugar, and flour.
7. Mix at medium speed until well combined.
8. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
9. Blend in the skim milk and almond extract.
10. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
11. Bake at 325 degrees F (approximately 160 degrees C) for 45 to 50 minutes or until the center is nearly set; the cheesecake will appear soft but will firm up as it cools.
12. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan before removing the rim itself.
13. Chill completely.
14. Top with fresh slices of strawberries or blueberries, if desired.
Variation:
Prepare the pan as directed; omit the blender step. Instead, place the cottage cheese in a large mixing bowl and beat until smooth using an electric mixer at high speed. Then add the softened Nufchatel Cheese, sugar, and flour, mixing at medium speed until well blended before proceeding with steps 8-13.
